name: Gate Audit
description: Standing deliverable-gate audit chain for the Owner (KUT). Validates the canonical tags, classifies token-fill confidence (surfaces silent defaults), verifies element maturity against the milestone LOD matrix, reports per-discipline completeness, and confirms scheme-tag consistency. Run before every Deliverable A/B/C / conformed-set publish; the LOD gate report under _BIM_COORD/lod_reports/ is the artefact that accompanies the drawings.

steps.label: ISO 19650 tag validation — all 8 token segments present + code-valid
Token-fill confidence — High/Medium/Low by provenance; flags silent BLD1 defaults
LOD maturity verification against the milestone matrix (pick the gate milestone)
Scheme-tag consistency — rendered identifiers match current tokens
